sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23923" key="dekaxei/loi" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκα-χείλοι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεκα[κι]σχίλιοι,</foreign> Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεκάχιλοι.</foreign> </entryFree>
